## Confirmations

- [ ] My PR adds a directory under `submissions/<my-github-handle>/<library-slug>/`.
- [ ] The directory contains exactly `library.scribblylib` and `meta.yaml`.
- [ ] All in-library text is English.
- [ ] The library is original work, or a remix I have permission to publish under the declared license.
- [ ] The license I picked is one of: `MIT`, `Apache-2.0`, `CC0-1.0`, `CC-BY-4.0`, `CC-BY-SA-4.0`.
- [ ] If this updates a slug I previously published, I bumped `meta.version`.
- [ ] I read the content guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md and believe this library complies.
